'''darupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:yakare|yakare]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yakare|yakare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| darupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæripith|dæripith]] || [[word:dæripij|dæripij]] || [[word:dæripish|dæripish]] || [[word:dæripi|dæripi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:daruruputh|daruruputh]] || [[word:darurupuj|darurupuj]] || [[word:darurupush|darurupush]] || [[word:darurupu|darurupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:daruputh|daruputh]] || [[word:darupuj|darupuj]] || [[word:darupush|darupush]] || [[word:darupu|darupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:darufputh|darufputh]] || [[word:darufpuj|darufpuj]] || [[word:darufpush|darufpush]] || [[word:darufpuf|darufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:daruputhu|daruputhu]] || [[word:darupuju|darupuju]] || [[word:darupushu|darupushu]] || [[word:darupuku|darupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:daruputh|daruputh]] || [[word:darupuj|darupuj]] || [[word:darupush|darupush]] || [[word:darupu|darupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:daruputhul|daruputhul]] || [[word:darupujul|darupujul]] || [[word:darupushul|darupushul]] || [[word:darupukul|darupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:daruputhuthu|daruputhuthu]] || [[word:darupujuju|darupujuju]] || [[word:darupushushu|darupushushu]] || [[word:darupuku|darupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:daruputhun|daruputhun]] || [[word:darupujun|darupujun]] || [[word:darupushun|darupushun]] || [[word:darupukun|darupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:daruputhuoro|daruputhuoro]] || [[word:darupujuoro|darupujuoro]] || [[word:darupushuoro|darupushuoro]] || [[word:darupukuoro|darupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
